mapper.select:
select c.id, c.course_name, c.course_code, u.real_name as teacher_name, c.description from course c left join user u on c.teacher_id = u.id
order by c.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into course ( course_name, course_code, teacher_id, description ) values ( #{courseName}, #{courseCode}, #{teacherId}, #{description} )
mapper.select:
select
c.id as courseId,
c.course_name as courseName,
count(distinct uc.user_id) as studentCount,
count(distinct hs.student_id) as submitCount,
( count(distinct uc.user_id) - count(distinct hs.student_id) ) as unSubmitCount,
round(avg(sr.score),2) as averageScore,
round( count(distinct hs.student_id) / count(distinct uc.user_id) *100, 2 ) as completeRate
from course c
left join user_course uc on c.id = uc.course_id
left join homework h on c.id = h.course_id
left join homework_submit hs on h.id = hs.homework_id
left join score_record sr on hs.id = sr.submit_id
group by c.id, c.course_name
order by c.id
mapper.update:
update course
set
course_name = #{courseName},
course_code = #{courseCode},
teacher_id = #{teacherId},
description = #{description}
where id = #{id}
